---
title: "Development"
engine: knitr
format: html
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

This file contains commands for developing the Python package.

```{r,eval=FALSE}
setwd("C:/Users/arauschenberger/Desktop/collasso")
system("pip install -e .")

system("ruff check .")

system("mypy .")

system("docstr-coverage src/ --skip-init")

system("pydoclint --style=numpy src/")

system("pydocstyle --convention=numpy")

system("numpydoc lint src/collasso/multi_task.py")
system("numpydoc lint src/collasso/single_task.py")
system("numpydoc lint src/collasso/simulate.py") # not compatible with docrep
system("numpydoc lint src/collasso/_helpers.py")

system("pylint .")

system("pytest tests/")
```


```{bash,eval=FALSE}
sphinx-apidoc -o docs/source src/collasso --separate
cd docs
make html
sphinx-autobuild source build/html
```
